title: Add AMD ROCm support + Micro-MoE architecture for parameter golf
author: rav-lad

data.description: Top-1 gated mixture-of-experts applied in the last N layers to increase MLP capacity without doubling compute per token.
Auxiliary load balancing loss to encourage more even expert utilization in the MoE layers.
Flexible unbank/rebank mechanism for the MoE bank structure.

AMD ROCm support including SDPA fallback instead of flash_attn_3, disabling torch.compile via NO_COMPILE on ROCm, single-GPU mode without torchrun, NCCL to GLOO distributed fallback, and rocm-smi fallback for GPU info logging.

novel_contributions: AMD ROCm support for training/inference compatibility
SDPA fallback replacing flash_attn_3 on AMD GPUs
NO_COMPILE environment variable to disable torch.compile on ROCm
Micro-MoE architecture with top-1 gating in the last N layers
Auxiliary load balancing loss for expert utilization
Flexible unbank/rebank support for MoE bank structure
NCCL to GLOO fallback for AMD distributed training
rocm-smi fallback for GPU info logging
